result:
**Round 11 complete.** Added save/load state persistence:

- **`Ctrl-S`** saves everything (grid, zones, emitters, absorbers, rules, symmetry) to auto-numbered `save_001.life`, `save_002.life`, etc.
- **`Ctrl-O`** loads the most recent save, fully restoring the simulation state
- Binary format with magic header + version byte for forward compatibility
- Green status flash confirms save/load with filename
- ~190 lines added (2058 total), clean compile, zero new dependencies
